text:
Prediction: Yes

The current visit record indicates that the patient has been diagnosed with "Pure hypercholesterolemia." This diagnosis is a clear indication of a lipid metabolism disorder, which falls under the category of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism." Additionally, the presence of Atorvastatin, a medication commonly used to manage high cholesterol levels, further supports the ongoing management of this condition. Given this explicit evidence of a lipid disorder, it is reasonable to predict that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be coded in the patient's next hospital visit.
